chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 631 of 2014 SCRA 632 of 2014 SCRA 633 of 2014 SCRA 634 of 2014 SCRA 635 of 2014 SCRA 636 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3245/2014. 23.09.2025 Mr. Khalid Rajper, advocate for the applicants in SCRAs 631/2014, 633/2014 & 634/2014. Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for the applicants in SCRAs 633/2014, 635/2014 & 636/2014. Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, advocate for the respondent. These reference applications assail respective orders of the learned Appellate Tribunal dated 01.07.2014, passed in Customs Appeal No.K-1069/2011, Customs Appeal No.K-1070/2011, Customs Appeal No.K-1071/2011, Customs Appeal No.K-1072/2011, Customs Appeal No.K-1073/2011 and Customs Appeal No.K-1074/2011. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper for the impugned orders to be set aside and the cases be remanded back to the Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is also instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
